reason: Bitcoin has shown a recovery, snapping back near the critical $69,000 level. However, analysts' warnings of the market 'not being out of the woods yet' indicate significant overhead resistance and potential for continued volatility. While broader tech sentiment is positive (Nvidia), internal crypto market news (Blockfills CEO, Kalshi insider trading) adds a layer of uncertainty and potential FUD. The immediate outlook suggests a battle for direction, making caution paramount.
headlines: Bitcoin snaps back near $69,000 but analysts warn the market may not be out of the woods yet
Nvidia earnings smashed expectations as the world’s largest company CEO says AI is only getting better
MrBeast editor nabbed by prediction market firm Kalshi for alleged insider trading
What early Bitcoin architect Adam Back thinks of this cycle
Blockfills co-founder and CEO Nicholas Hammer has stepped down
